title: Delightful Fares
description: Addon for Farmer's Delight and Bountiful Fares adding some more compatibility between the two mods, and most importantly - kettles.
body:
# Overwiew
Delightful Fares is a bridge between Farmer's Delight and Bountiful Fares adding kettle with custom tea brewing recipes that have increased yields compared to regular crafting recipes, inspired by cooking pot but having a fluid input and output.

![Kettle and teabag placed in the world](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1de5141134eb6d593fd59c3424feace58c85b336.png)
# Features
Current features:
- Kettle block entity inspired by cooking pot
- Kettle can hold 2 ingredients, 1 serving container and 1 bucket (1000mB) of fluid, which stay in the item upon breaking.
- Kettle can drain fluids directly from world or other fluid tanks
- Kettle can fill other fluid tanks with it's contents and be used to fill offhand containers with appropriate fluid. 
- Tooltips that show which of these functions are currently available (based on kettle's contents which is also displayed)
- Tea bag item (1 paper and 1 string yields 4 teabags) which can be combined with tea ingredients.
- New brewing recipes with proper JEI integration.

W.I.P. features:
- New tea types and ingredients
- Kettle variants obtainable through smithing

Upcoming features:
- Jars for storage and display of tea ingredients
- Flower decoctions inspired by minecraft's suspicious stews
- Plantable flowers
- Advancements


# Getting started
![Kettle recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5058dae831a3233d0d75161fa37e3b8f3102231c_0.webp) 

Craft a kettle, grab water and harvest some herbs to brew some tea (Recipes are available in JEI).

# F.A.Q
Q. Can I use this mod inside my modpack?

A. Yeah

Q. Compatibility with (...)?

A. The mod is constructed in such a way that adding compatibility is mostly adding recipes via datapacks, alternatively needs a simple fluid to be added so it can be used in recipe. I might be adding some compatibility with mods I use already some time soon.

Q. Which Minecraft versions will the mod be updated for?

A. Delightful Fares is currently being updated for 1.21.1 and might come to 1.20.1 if I feel the need for it 

Q. Are you going to backport this mod/port it to fabric(quilt)?

A. No, the mod is heavily reliant on farmer's delight and bountiful fares so I can't backport it freely and I don't plan to use fabric or quilt any time soon.
